latest.title: Owls rotate their heads all the way around
latest.script_key: this owl s head spins 270 degrees watch how it locks its eyes on prey without moving its body that s because its neck arteries loop like a spring to keep blood flowing did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Mountains grow taller every year in ways you missed
latest.script_key: these peaks aren t shrinking they re actually climbing see how the glacier scrapes away the valley floor that s why the mountain s free to rise like a seesaw that rock layer you re looking at it lifts faster than your fingernails grow so next time you hike up take a picture you might just prove the mountain grew

latest.title: Whales breach for reasons you think wrong
latest.script_key: they don t breach to play that splash isn t joy it s sonar whales breach to stun fish into tight schools then gobble them like a net watch the herd scatter mid air because the hit vibrates through water that s why those big flops aren t celebration they re dinner calls

latest.title: Forests make cooler air under the canopy
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next

latest.title: Tall trees hide their age in plain sight
